mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_base (id, tenant_id, name, description, created_by, version, gmt_create, gmt_modified) VALUES (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{createdBy}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, name, description, created_by, version, gmt_create, gmt_modified FROM knowledge_base WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY gmt_create DESC
